steps.script: () => { const cm = document.querySelector('.CodeMirror'); return !!(cm && cm.CodeMirror && typeof cm.CodeMirror.setValue === 'function'); }

(text) => { try { const cm = document.querySelector('.CodeMirror'); if (!cm || !cm.CodeMirror) return { success: false, error: 'CodeMirror not found' }; cm.CodeMirror.setValue(text); cm.CodeMirror.refresh(); return { success: true, length: text.length }; } catch(e) { return { success: false, error: e.message }; } }

() => { const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button.xitu-btn')).find(b => b.innerText.trim() === '发布'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return { success: true }; } return { success: false, error: 'publish button not found' }; }

() => { const popup = document.querySelector('.publish-popup'); if (!popup) return { success: false }; const preferred = ['后端', '前端', '人工智能', '开发工具', '代码人生', '阅读']; const items = Array.from(popup.querySelectorAll('.category-list .item')); for (const name of preferred) { const el = items.find(i => i.innerText.trim() === name); if (el) { el.click(); return { success: true, category: name }; } } if (items[0]) { items[0].click(); return { success: true, category: items[0].innerText.trim(), fallback: true }; } return { success: false }; }

() => { const popup = document.querySelector('.publish-popup'); const input = popup ? popup.querySelector('.tag-input input.byte-select__input') : null; if (!input) return { success: false }; input.click(); input.focus(); return { success: true }; }

() => { const first = document.querySelector('.byte-select-option'); if (first) { first.click(); return { success: true, tag: first.innerText.trim() }; } return { success: false, error: 'no tag options found' }; }

() => { const popup = document.querySelector('.publish-popup'); if (!popup) return { success: false }; const btn = Array.from(popup.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.innerText.trim() === '确定并发布'); if (btn && !btn.disabled) { btn.click(); return { success: true }; } return { success: false, error: btn ? 'button disabled' : 'button not found' }; }
